changelog: Self-hosted FoxDesk can now sync data to FoxDesk Cloud through a token-protected migration bridge
The migration sync includes core tables, object mapping, and attachment upload to the SaaS storage driver
Admins can connect to FoxDesk Cloud, analyze the migration plan, and keep ZIP export as an offline fallback
Final cutover can disable local IMAP/email processing and redirect users to the cloud workspace
CLI maintenance now skips update checks, email ingest, and recurring tasks after cloud cutover
